stories.headline: EU Parliament Approves Landmark AI Governance Framework
stories.summary: The European Parliament passed a comprehensive AI regulation bill, setting global standards for ethical AI development and deployment. This affects tech companies and citizens worldwide.

stories.headline: Major Quantum Computing Breakthrough Achieved in Japan
stories.summary: Researchers in Japan announced a significant leap in quantum error correction, accelerating the timeline for practical quantum computers. This could revolutionize industries globally.

stories.headline: Global Markets React to Unexpected US Interest Rate Hold
stories.summary: The US Federal Reserve unexpectedly held interest rates steady, defying predictions of a cut and causing volatility in global stock and bond markets. This impacts investor confidence and economic outlooks worldwide.

stories.headline: Humanitarian Aid Pledged as East African Famine Worsens
stories.summary: International donors committed emergency aid to East Africa as a severe drought exacerbates famine conditions, threatening millions. Urgent action is needed to prevent widespread loss of life.

stories.headline: New Gene Therapy Shows Promise for Inherited Blindness
stories.summary: Clinical trials for a novel gene therapy have yielded promising results in restoring sight for patients with a specific inherited retinal disease. This offers hope for millions suffering from similar conditions.
